ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandsOnLLM/Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
Language: jupyter-notebook
Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/MiniCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM
Language: jupyter-notebook
MiniCPM5-1B: A SOTA 1B on-device LLM, small yet powerful.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chiphuyen/aie-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chiphuyen/aie-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
[WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始构建大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: digitalinnovationone/dio-lab-open-source
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/digitalinnovationone/dio-lab-open-source
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repositório do lab "Contribuindo em um Projeto Open Source no GitHub" da Digital Innovation One.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov2
Language: jupyter-notebook
PyTorch code and models for the DINOv2 self-supervised learning method.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/sam2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam2
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/tribev2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/tribev2
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository contains the code to train and evaluate TRIBE v2, a multimodal model for brain response prediction

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hustvl/4DGaussians
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hustvl/4DGaussians
Language: jupyter-notebook
[CVPR 2024] 4D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Dynamic Scene Rendering
